density.interior_trim_rule: remove one pooled-mask voxel from each bbox face where possible

thickness.note: Local thickness is twice the distance-to-background radius; values are limited by the pooled-mask resolution.

spatial_stage2a.edge_definition: any normalized coordinate below 0.2 or above 0.8

spatial_stage2b_reviewed.edge_definition: any normalized coordinate below 0.2 or above 0.8

limitations: Measurements use the Stage 2a factor-4 max-pooled mask.
Outer-skin exclusion is an inward one-voxel bbox trim, not a CAD-derived wall mask.
Distance-transform thickness is an apparent segmented thickness and is resolution-limited.
Spatial edge/center and clustering thresholds are descriptive, not defect-certification criteria.
